message:
test(dashboard): add terminal integration test

Add integration tests for the HTTP/WebSocket terminal layer that validate:
- CID 0 returns appropriate error (VM not available)
- Nonexistent task returns 404

Uses a mock DaemonAPI to test the HTTP layer without requiring
actual vsock connections.
